text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Encounter Records RIFs Codebook │ May 2025 │ V 1.7 16 

CLM_BPRVDR_ADR_ZIP_CD 

LABEL: Billing Provider Zip Code 

DESCRIPTION: This variable is the 9-digit zip code for the primary practice/business location of the physician receiving 
the payment or other transfer of value (i.e., the billing provider). 

SHORT NAME: CLM_BPRVDR_ADR_ZIP_CD 

LONG NAME: CLM_BPRVDR_ADR_ZIP_CD 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 9 

SOURCE: CMS Encounter Data System
